section.div: 49% of my body is made of movies.

section.h2: Recent coding habits (computed from last 42 commits)

ul.li: Has approximately 175.6 characters per line of code written

div.div: Star Wars: Episode V - The Empire Strikes Back - The Imperial March
Kill 20 Jockeys with the shovel or pitchfork.
Kill a pouncing Hunter with a shotgun.
Kill a Tank only with damage from the original Survivors.
KILLING THEM SWIFTLY TO THIS SONG
Play the new Midnight Riders song on a jukebox.
Help porters through a MULE or terrorist area for the first time.
Complete at least 10 unique premium deliveries in each order category with an evaluation of "Legend," "Legend of Legends," or "Legend of Legends of Legends."
Find all the tarot graffiti for the job Fool on the Hill.
Play a gamemode that isn't sandbox
Complete 8 different levels sequentially under par time without dying on Ultra-Violence or higher.
Immolate a total of 30 arachnoid enemies with the Incinerator.
Obliterate 50 enemies with a single shot of the Calamity Blade.
Discover and smash your first heart crystal underground.
Build a house suitable enough for your first town NPC, such as the guide, to move into.
Equip armor in all three armor slots: head, chest, and feet.
Mine your first nugget of ore with a pickaxe.
